title.en: After asking the question, Ye Tian no longer ke...

content.en:
After asking the question, Ye Tian no longer kept these Temu clans.

There's no way he's going to let them go, or the secret here will be exposed.

Ye Tian didn't think that only the galaxy-level pinnacle could keep the Ancient Tree of Life and the inheritance here, and even the nine supreme-level forces of the human race would intervene and get a piece of the pie.

Therefore, he must kill all the Temu people here.

Rumble!!!

The power of time and space enveloped these Tiemu clans, and under the urging of Ye Tian's thoughts, these ironwood clans were all wiped out by the power of time and space.

"Zhou Tian, you wait here, there are still some Ironwood Clans in other parts of this inheritance world, I'll go and get rid of them!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, Master!"

Zhou Tian responded.

In the next day, Ye Tian found out the other Tiemu clans in the inheritance world one by one and wiped them all out.

Now, there is no one left in this inheritance world.

Under the Ancient Tree of Life.

Ye Tian and Zhou Tian looked at the Ancient Tree of Life and discussed the issue of the sap of the Tree of Life.

"Zhou Tian, this ancient tree of life also gave birth to some sap of the tree of life, and the Temu clan didn't take it, let's take it first. You and I are half, how about it?"

Ye Tian asked.

Zhou Tian nodded: "Listen to the master!"

Immediately, Ye Tian re-excavated the ancient tree of life where the Tiemu clan had excavated it, and intercepted the sap of the ancient tree of life.

Soon, a large amount of life ancient tree sap was taken out by Ye Tian and divided equally with Zhou Tian.

Although the sap of the Ancient Tree of Life is not much, it is a lot for two people.

After Zhou Tian obtained the sap of the Ancient Tree of Life, he couldn't wait to go to the palace next to him and retreat and cultivate.

And Ye Tian also found a cultivation room in the palace to practice retreat.

He doesn't need to use the sap of the Living Tree to increase his lifespan, because he already has an infinite lifespan.

However, he still left a few copies of the sap of the Tree of Life, and when he returned, he gave it to his wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu.

In this way, the two of them can live an infinite lifespan, and they don't need to wait until the Universe God Realm to enjoy an infinite lifespan.

Immediately, Ye Tian put all the remaining Life Tree sap in a pool.

"These life tree sap should be enough for me to impact the sixth layer of the Tianyuan True Law, I hope that the impact can be successful, so that I can become a sixth order life, and then the physical strength will be even more terrifying!" Ye Tian said expectantly.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the sap pool of the Tree of Life, and his whole body was soaked in it.

Then, Ye Tian ran the Tianyuan True Law and began to cultivate the Tianyuan True Law, impacting the sixth layer of the Tianyuan True Law.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's progress was stable and orderly.

The other side.

Zhou Tian used the sap of the tree of life to make his vitality stronger and stronger, and although the strength of his physical body could not be improved, his lifespan increased indefinitely.

Ten million years!

100 million years!

A billion years!

......

In the blink of an eye, a month passed, and Zhou Tian's lifespan was almost unlimited, no different from the lifespan of the cosmic gods.

It can be said that as long as the universe is not destroyed, his lifespan is equal to eternity.

"In the future, I won't have to worry about my life anymore!"

Zhou Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, he went out of the customs and was ready to go to his master Ye Tian to share this joy.

But soon, he found that Master Ye Tian was also in retreat.

"Shizun is estimated to be refining the sap of the Life Tree, so let's wait for Shizun to get out, it shouldn't be long!"

Sunday guesses.

And so, day by day, waited.

In a flash, a year has passed.

this day.

The cultivation room where Ye Tian was located emitted the life coercion of the sixth order of life.

Zhou Tian, who was outside Ye Tian's retreat cultivation room, suddenly felt the pressure of life, and the whole person suddenly fell to the ground, unable to get up at all.

"This coercion...... It's the coercion of life!!"

Zhou Tian was shocked.

His lifespan is already eternal, but he didn't expect that he couldn't withstand the pressure of his master's life.

"How can the life coercion of the master be so strong, I seem to be an ant!"

Zhou Tian thought in shock.

At this moment, he was even more in awe of his masters! even more awe than those supremes!

Cultivation room.

Ye Tian slowly opened his eyes, looked at the almost dried up sap of the Tree of Life in the pool, felt his current level of life again, and muttered: "I broke through by luck, fortunately I got a lot of Tree of Life sap, otherwise I would definitely fail to break through, or ask Zhou Tian for the sap of the Tree of Life." From the fifth order of life to the sixth order of life, the physical body is much stronger, and it can continue to improve. The sixth-order life is only one step away from the seventh-order life, and once it becomes the seventh-order life, the universe will be destroyed, and I will not be destroyed. At that time, even if I can't transcend and the universe is shattered, I will still be able to immortal!"

But he also knew very well that achieving a seventh-order life was even more difficult than transcendence!

Many transcendents have not actually become seventh-order lifeforms, but if Ye Tian can become a detached person, then he will definitely be able to become a seventh-order life, after all, he is now a sixth-order life, and the moment he becomes a transcendent, it is enough to improve the first-order life level.

Ye Tian did not immediately leave the level, but turned on the time acceleration, and by the way, he took out a lot of resources that could improve the strength of his physical body, and cultivated again.

Originally, his physical body had reached the limit, but now his life level has been raised to the sixth order, and he can continue to improve the strength of his physical body.

Therefore, he is ready to increase the strength of his physical body to the limit before exiting the level, and at that time, his combat power will soar again.

"Cultivate! Cultivate!"

Ye Tian accelerated his cultivation, and in just half a year, he completely increased the strength of his physical body to the limit.

At this moment, Ye Tian even felt that he could fight with some weak masters of the human race without falling behind, unless there were some more rebellious ones in the universe god realm, they were not his opponents at all.

Wow!

Ye Tian pushed open the door of the cultivation room and exited the gate.

As soon as he came out of the pass, Ye Tian still had some aura on his body that had not yet dissipated, which made Zhou Tian retreat again and again, not daring to approach Ye Tian.

"Congratulations, Master, your strength has risen again!"

Zhou Tian congratulated.

"Zhou Tian, you are also very good, your lifespan is eternal, you can rest assured that you can accumulate your foundation at the god level!"

Ye Tian was pleased.

"Thank you, Master, for your praise!"

Zhou Tian hurriedly said.

"Let's go, let's go to the inheritance of this world and have a look!" Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

Zhou Tian is also very interested in the inheritance of this world, and if he obtains some powerful inheritance, it will also be of great use to his strength growth.

So, Zhou Tian followed Ye Tian to the land of inheritance.

The Land of Inheritance is not far from here, and soon the two of them will reach their destination.

-------

"This is it!"

Ye Tian looked at an ancient temple of life in front of him and said.

Rushing!!!

The two stepped into the temple of life together.

At this moment, a young girl with green wings appeared.

"Hey, it's someone again!"

The machine spirit said cheerfully.

"Machine Spirit, we have to participate in the assessment!"

Ye Tiandao.

He knew from the Ironwood Clan that there was a machine spirit here, a girl who looked like a green elf in front of him.

Regardless of the identity of the person who came, the machine spirit is only responsible for the assessment of the inheritor.

"Good!"

The girl replied.

Wow!

Ye Tian and Zhou Tian were teleported to the assessment at the same time.

The life elves are not good at fighting, so the assessment content has nothing to do with fighting.

The assessment only assesses the understanding of the avenue of life!

Ye Tiannai is a sixth-order life, it is estimated that he is much more powerful than the life elf clan, and he has inherited the Tianyuan True Method, this technique is simply an extremely high study of the Great Dao of Life.

Therefore, Ye Tian's understanding of the avenue of life is also very high.

So, from the first round of assessment, Ye Tian cleared the customs again and again, and easily completed the life avenue assessment set up by the life elf clan.

When Ye Tian cleared all the customs, the girl's machine spirit appeared.

She stared at Ye Tian with a very surprised gaze, and said, "I didn't expect you to pass all the assessments, your understanding on the Avenue of Life is comparable to that of the elders of the Life Elf Clan!

Then, the maiden machine spirit took out the life codex.

And this is not a simple inheritance, but a physical life canon that can be taken away and even given to outsiders to cultivate.

"The Life Elves are so generous, they don't even need to set any constraints!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

After receiving the Life Divine Codex, Ye Tian briefly flipped through it.

After reading it, Ye Tian frowned.

"I overestimate the life elves, this life canon can be called an encyclopedia of the avenue of life, but unfortunately it is of little use to me, and it is not even as precious as one-tenth of the Tianyuan True Law. However, it is also true that the Tianyuan True Law directly refers to the supreme secret method of the life level, and the Life Divine Code is more like a study of the Great Dao of Life, with most theories, for a race, the Life Divine Code is more precious, but for individuals, it is the Tianyuan True Law that is more precious!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, the Life Divine Scripture can allow Ye Tian to have a better understanding of the Tianyuan True Law, and his cultivation will be easier in the future, but it will not be of much use otherwise.

"Let's put it away first!"

Ye Tian received the Life Divine Scripture and came out of the Life Divine Scripture.

And Zhou Tian hadn't come out yet, so Ye Tian was waiting outside.
